{{Quote|Tell… tell Shasa… the Sith…|Galas' last words before dying|<ref name="Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic">''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]''</ref>}}
'''Galas''' was a young [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived during the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. He, along with his friend [[Shasa]] and many other Selkath youth, was taken in by the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] in an attempt to subvert the [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] government. When he indicated his desire to leave the [[Sith Embassy]], he was tortured to [[Death/Legends|death]] by the Sith, who told Shasa and the others that he had returned to [[Ahto City]]. [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] found him in his dying moments and took from Galas a pin that one of his fellow apprentices had given him as a child. Revan then gave this pin to Shasa, who recognized it and realized that the Sith were responsible for Galas' death.

==Appearances==
